The '''''Cal''-class battleship''' was the final version of a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] type designed by the [[Kumauri Empire]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Characteristics==
Ships of the class were 3,000 meters long. They had an armament of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] for ship-to-ship combat, but their prime weapon was a large [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass-driver cannon]] mounted along the top of the hull.<ref name="CRO" />

This was an [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] weapon, which was designed to pound its target with captured [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]], or other suitable interplanetary flotsam. To collect ammunition for loading the prime weapon, ''Cal''-class ships were also equipped with six [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors.<ref name="CRO" />

==History==
The ''Cal''-class was the last, and most feared, development of the ''[[Kumauri Battleship]]'' lineage originally developed around [[10,000 BBY]] by [[Vall Kumauri]], but which was adopted by many fleets, including that of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="CRO" />

The threat of the design was finally ended by the introduction of [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]], although at least one ''Cal''-class warship, the ''[[Cal Ambre]]'', remained spaceworthy during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], converted into a luxury deep-space casino.<ref name="CRO" />
